case_title: PETER VESTINOS VS. FILLMORE GRILL LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VESTINOS, PETER AS TO DEFENDANT FILLMORE GRILL LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA LONG BAR & BISTRO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VESTINOS, PETER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FILLMORE GRILL LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA LONG BAR & BISTRO $4,807.74 PRINCIPAL, $11.34 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,044.08, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
